mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_document_split_config WHERE id = 1 AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lwh_ai_document_split_config (id, target_chunk_length, split_by_blank_line, preserve_markdown_title, status) VALUES (1, #{targetChunkLength}, #{splitByBlankLine}, #{preserveMarkdownTitle}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_chunk_length = target_chunk_length
mapper.update: UPDATE lwh_ai_document_split_config SET target_chunk_length = #{targetChunkLength}, split_by_blank_line = #{splitByBlankLine}, preserve_markdown_title = #{preserveMarkdownTitle}, status = 1 WHERE id = 1
